# UI Spec: <feature / screen>

> Owner: **UI Designer** · Builds on the UX spec; consumed by engineers. Part of gate 2.

## Visual design
Layout, spacing, and the look for each screen/state. (Link mockups if any.)

## Design system
- **Tokens:** color, typography, spacing, radius, elevation.
- **Components:** which existing components are used; any new ones (with states).

## Responsive behaviour
Breakpoints and how the layout adapts.

## Assets
Icons, images, fonts — names/links and where they live.

## Handoff notes
Anything engineers need to implement pixel-accurately (exact values, edge cases).
